_comment: Refreshable proof stats for /launcher. Updated weekly by tools/stripe-refresh.js (Sunday 6 AM cron). Static fields are marked. Hand-edit static fields with care.

daysToFirst500._note: Historical: $0 → $500 happened Mar 25 → Apr 10 2026. Doesn't change.

paidCustomers._note: Total successful charges. Refreshed from Stripe weekly.

totalRevenue._note: Sum of successful, non-refunded charges. Refreshed from Stripe weekly.

emailSubscribers._note: Mailchimp list 1550e2956c member count. Refreshed weekly.

dataAsOfDate._note: Date of most recent refresh. Auto-set by the cron.
